name: codex-led-widget-mac
description: macOS desktop widget for displaying local Codex usage quota.

interface.shortDescription: A macOS desktop widget for local Codex quota.
interface.longDescription: Codex LED Widget for macOS is a liquid-glass desktop widget that reads local Codex rate-limit information through the Codex app-server and displays remaining quota, reset windows, plan labels, and status colors.
defaultPrompt: Show me how to install the Codex LED Widget.
Build the macOS Codex quota widget.
Check my local Codex quota widget setup.
